function.name: goep_server_setpath
function.signature: static void goep_server_setpath(struct bt_obex_server *server, uint8_t flags, struct net_buf *buf)

bug.description: use-after-free vulnerability where freed memory is subsequently accessed

prompt:
There is a use-after-free vulnerability where freed memory is subsequently accessed downstream of function goep_server_setpath in the subsys/bluetooth/host subsystem.
The function is located at subsys/bluetooth/host/classic/shell/goep.c:173.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
